content:
Actively seeking Associate Trainee/Legal Assistant and Legal Associate opportunities in Corporate Law, Contract Drafting & Management, E-discovery Agreement Review, and Intellectual Property Rights (IPR)!

I’m a fresh B.B.A.LL.B. (Hons.) Graduate (2021–2026) from Teerthanker Mahaveer University, Moradabad, with strong hands-on experience in drafting, reviewing, and managing legal documents, Agreement Contract IPR matters, and corporate compliance.

Key Highlights from my experience:

1. Drafted and reviewed contracts, notices, applications, affidavits, rent agreements, and arbitration clauses while ensuring statutory compliance at Deity Law Chambers, A&N Associates, and Jagdamba Diligence Attorneys & Pleaders.

2. Conducted in-depth legal research on IPR, corporate governance, contract law, and civil laws using SCC Online, Manupatra, and Indian Kanoon.
Hands-on involvement in Trademark searches and IPR (Trademark) litigation at Dey & Kumhar Co.

3. Assisted in District Court and High Court proceedings and managed case files end-to-end.

4. Certified in Advanced Contract Drafting and Basics of Intellectual Property Law (The Legal School, 2025).

5. Additional experience in legal content writing (Legitimate INDIA) and HR operations.

Proficient in MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and known for accuracy, quick learning, and a collaborative approach.

I am eager to bring my skills in contract drafting, agreement review & management, and IPR to a dynamic law firm or corporate legal team. Open to opportunities in Delhi/NCR (preferred) or remote/hybrid roles.

If you’re hiring or know of any openings, I’d love to connect! Feel free to DM me or tag relevant recruiters/organizations.

Thank you!

Mohd Zahid
+91-7310686246
mz07082003@gmail.com

#CorporateLaw #ContractDrafting #IPR #AgreementReview #LegalJobs #AssociateTrainee #LawGraduate #IntellectualProperty #Noida #Hiring #LegalInternship
#Noida #delhi #LPO #review #Ediscovery #LegalAssistant #LegalConsultant #LegalAssociate #US #UK #LPO #Outsourcing #LPO #Paralegal #ContractManagement
comment: For legal roles today, strong drafting skills are only one part of the equation; understanding business context, risk allocation, and how contracts operate after execution often becomes the real differentiator.
